Re-Notice Of Motion For A Court Order Referring Case To Mediation In Lieu Of Judicial Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-30-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Defendant's Motion for a Court Order Referring Case to Mediation in Lieu of Judicial Arbitration is scheduled today. There being no appearance or objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Court Trial Date of 3/3/2002 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206 is ordered set. Mediation OSC is set on 12/11/2002 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and to give notice of the Mediation OSC. Moving party to submit a proposed order of court ruling removing case from arbitration and referring case to mediation. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
